hero.kicker: Our little one is on the way!

reveal.p: The real reveal is at the cake-cutting — stay tuned! 🎂

favors.title: Before You Go! 🤍
favors.body: Please don't forget to grab a party favor on your way out! Just a little token of our appreciation for celebrating with us today.

footer.line1: made with 🐝 + 💛 for our little one
